Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

Enuma Anu Enlil 56

Obverse
11

* ina itiBARA₂ mulUDU.IDIM IGI ŠEu ŠE.GIŠ.I₃ SI.SA₂ GANBA ina-pu-uš

(1) (If) in Nisannu (I) a planet appears: barley and sesame will thrive; business will expand.

22

* mulUDU.IDIM ina SAG itiBARA₂ IGI u₂-kul-ti dNERGALₓ(U.GUR) a-bu-bu

(2) (If) a planet appears at the start of Nisannu (I): devouring by Nergal; flood.

33

* mulUDU.IDIM ina itiKIN 2-KAM₂ IGI ŠU.BI.AŠ.AM₃<(u₂-kul-ti)> dNERGALₓ(U.GUR) a-bu-bu

(3) (If) a planet appears in 2nd Ululu (VI/2): ditto (devouring by Nergal; flood).

44

* mulUDU.IDIM ina SAG itiKIN it-tan-mar u₂-kul-ti dNERGALₓ(U.GUR) GARan

(4) (If) a planet keeps appearing at the start of Ululu (VI): devouring by Nergal will take place.

55

* mulUDU.IDIM ina itiDU₆ IGIir ina GIŠ.NIM u GIŠ.ŠU₂ ME₃ GARan

(5) (If) a planet appears in Tašritu (VII) at sunrise or at sunset: a battle will take place.

66

* mulUDU.IDIM ina SAG itiDU₆ it-tan-mar ŠU.BI.AŠ.AM₃<(ME₃)> GARan

(6) (If) a planet keeps appearing at the start of Tašritu (VII): ditto (a battle will take place).

77

* mulUDU.IDIM ina ITI 6-KAM₂ IGI ina dUTU.E₃.A u dUTU.ŠU₂.A ME₃ GAL GARan

(7) (If) a planet appears in the 6th month at sunrise or at sunset: a great battle will take place.

88

* mulUDU.IDIM ina itiAPIN IGI lu₂SA.GAZ GAL₂-MEŠ

(8) (If) a planet appears in Arahsamnu (VIII): there will be bandits.

99

* mulUDU.IDIM ina SAG itiAPIN IGI lu₂SA.GAZ GAL₂-MEŠ

(9) (If) a planet appears at the start of Arahsamnu (VIII): there will be bandits.

1010

* mulUDU.IDIM ina itiGAN IGIir lu₂SA.GAZ GAL₂-MEŠ

(10) (If) a planet appears in Kislimu (IX): there will be bandits.

1111

* mulUDU.IDIM ina SAG itiGAN IGIir lu₂SA.GAZ GAL₂-MEŠ BAD₅.BAD₅ GARan

(11) (If) a planet appears at the start of Kislimu (XI): there will be bandits; a defeat will occur.

1212

* mulUDU.IDIM ina itiGAN iṣ-ru-uḫ-ma MU₂.MU₂ DINGIR-MEŠ UB.DA.LIMMU₂.BA LU₃-MEŠ

(12) (If) a planet flares up in Kislimu (XI) and remains lit up: the gods of the Four Edges will be disturbed.

1313

* mulUDU.IDIM ina itiAB IGI RI.RI.GA AB₂.GU₄-ḪI.A U₈.UDU-ḪI.A

(13) (If) a planet appears in Ṭebetu (X): epidemic of cattle and flocks.

1414

* mulUDU.IDIM ina itiAB KUR-ma : GUB-ma ṣe-re-es-su <ṣa>-al-mat u₂-kul-ti AB₂.GU₄-ḪI.A u₃ U₈.UDU-ḪI.A

(14) (If) a planet rises in Ṭebetu (X) (or): stands (there), and its halo is black: devouring of cattle and flocks.

1515

* mulUDU.IDIM ina itiŠE IGIir NAM.UŠ₂-MEŠ GAL₂-MEŠ

(15) (If) a planet appears in Addaru (XII): there will be plagues.

1616

* mulUDU.IDIM ina dUTU.E₃.A KI.MIN ina GU₄.U₄.dUTU IGIir lu₂KUR₂ ina KUR ŠU.TI.A

(16) (If) a planet appears at sunrise, alternatively at the rising of the sun: an enemy will take from the land.

1717

* mulUDU.IDIM IGI-ma U₄ 3-KAM₂ GUBiz ina dUTU.E₃.A u dUTU.ŠU₂.A ME₃ GARan

(17) (If) a planet appears and stands (there) for 3 days at sunrise or at sunset: a battle will take place.

1818

* mulUDU.IDIM U₄ 1-KAM₂ U₄ 2-KAM ina ANe uš-tab-ri-ma la ir-bi ŠU.BI.AŠ.AM₃<(ME₃)> GARan

(18) (If) a planet remains visible without setting for 1 day, 2 days in the sky: ditto (a battle will take place).

1919

* ina itiBARA₂ mulUDU.IDIM KURḫa BURU₁₄ KUR SI.SA₂

(19) (If) in Nisannu (I) a planet rises: the harvest of the land will thrive.

2020

* ina itiGU₄ mulUDU.IDIM KURḫa KUR BI MUNUS.KUR₂ IGImar

(20) (If) in Ayyaru (II) a planet rises: that land will see enmity.

2121

* ina itiSIG₄ mulUDU.IDIM KURḫa KUR GANBA LA₂a GU₇

(21) (If) in Simanu (III) a planet rises: the land will enjoy decreased business.

2222

* ina itiŠU mulUDU.IDIM KURḫa UŠ₂-MEŠ GAL₂-MEŠ

(22) (If) in Duʾuzu (IV) a planet rises: there will be deaths.

2323

* ina itiNE mulUDU.IDIM KURḫa ne-ru-ba-a-tu₂ ina KUR GAL₂-MEŠ

(23) (If) in Abu (V) a planet rises: there will be flights from the land.

2424

* ina itiKIN mulUDU.IDIM KURḫa E₁₁ GANBA na-pa-aš₂ dNISABA

(24) (If) in Ululu (VI) a planet rises: rise in business, abundance of Nisaba.

2525

* ina itiDU₆ mulUDU.IDIM KURḫa LUGAL KUR KUR₂ la₃ UR₅tu₂ la₃ TEḫi-šu₂

(25) (If) in Tašritu (VII) a planet rises: the king - an enemy land which is not his will not approach him.

2626

* ina itiAPIN mulUDU.IDIM KURḫa KUR kar-mu-tu₂ DUak

(26) (If) in Arahsamnu (VIII) a planet rises: the land will go to ruin.

2727

* ina itiGAN mulUDU.IDIM KURḫa dIŠKUR KUR GU₇

(27) (If) in Kislimu (IX) a planet rises: Adad will devour the land.

2828

* ina itiAB mulUDU.IDIM KURḫa ŠUBti₃ GIG-MEŠ

(28) (If) in Ṭebetu (X) a planet rises: epidemic of the sick.

2929

* ina itiZIZ₂ mulUDU.IDIM KURḫa ŠA₃ KUR DU₁₀.GA KUR DAGALiš

(29) (If) in Šabaṭu (XI) a planet rises: the heart of the land will become good; the land will expand.

3030

* ina itiŠE mulUDU.IDIM KURḫa ŠUBti SIG₅ MAŠ₂.ANŠE

(30) (If) in Addaru (XII) a planet rises: epidemic of the best of the livestock.

3131

* ina itiDIRI.ŠE mulUDU.IDIM KURḫa KUR me-šer₂ IGI

(31) (If) in intercalary Addaru (XII/2) a planet rises: the land will see justice.

3232

* mulUDU.IDIM ša₂ dNIN.URTA šum-šu₂ ina GU₄.U₄.dUTUši KI d30 it-tan-mar KI.MIN ina GU₄.U₄.dUTUši KI 20.SIG IGI : KI 30 IGI.IGI

(32) (If) a planet whose name is Ninurta continually appears with the Moon at sunrise; alternatively, it appears at sunrise (and) with the sunset; (or): it continually appears with the Moon, in Ululu (VI), on the 7th day or the 14th day or the 15th day or the 16th day or the 17th day: flood; alternatively, an enemy will come; alternatively, eclipse.

3333

ina itiKIN U₄ 7-KAM₂ lu U₄ 14-KAM₂ lu U₄ 15-KAM₂ lu U₄ 16-KAM₂ lu U₄ 17-KAM₂ ILLU KI.MIN lu₂KUR₂ DUkam₂ KI.MIN AN.GE₆

3434

* mulUDU.IDIM ina KUR-šu₂ ina KUN dUTU ŠU₂-ma E₃a AB.SIN₂ pa-ni-ša₂ ip-te-te KI.MIN AB.SIN₂ IGI-šu₂ BAD-ma kiš-šu-tu₂ GAL₂-ma

(34) (If) a planet, as it rises, disappears into the Sun's tail and emerges (and) the furrow has opened its surface; alternatively, the furrow has opened its surface: there will be a take-over, but the successor will not occupy the throne; alternatively, his heir will not occupy (it); any Amorite, alternatively, a stranger will arise and occupy the throne.

3535

EGIR AŠ.TE la₃ TUŠab KI.MIN IBILA-šu₂ la₃ TUŠab a-mur-ru-u₂ a-a-um-ma KI.MIN a-ḫu-u₂ ZI-ma AŠ.TE TUŠab

3636

* dUTUši ŠU₂-ma ina KI.GUB-šu₂ mulUDU.IDIM GUBiz kiš-šu-tu₂ KI.MIN ḪI.GAR GAL₂-ma BAL KUR₂ir

(36) (If) the Sun sets and a planet stands in its position: there will be a take-over; alternatively, rebellion, and the reign will change.

3737

* mulUDU.IDIM ina ŠA₃ d30 GUBiz ina MU BI DINGIR ina KUR GU₇

(37) (If) a planet stands in the interior of the Moon: in that year a god will devour in the land.

3838

* mulUDU.IDIM ina SI 15 d30 GUBiz ina kurMARki SU.GU₇ GAL₂-MEŠ

(38) (If) a planet stands in the right horn of the Moon: there will be hunger in Amurru.

3939

* mulUDU.IDIM ina SI 2.30 d30 GUBiz LUGAL ŠU₂tu₂ DU₃uš

(39) (If) a planet stands in the left horn of the Moon: a king will exercise authority.

4040

* mulUDU.IDIM ina MAŠ.SILA₃ d30 GUB SIG₅ MAŠ₂.ANŠE KUR ŠUBut KI.MIN EN KUR muš-ke-nu-tu₂ DU

(40) (If) a planet stands in the flank of the Moon: the best of the livestock of the land will die; alternatively, the lord of the land will fall into poverty.

4141

* mulUDU.IDIM ina IGI d30 GUBiz ina MU BI UŠ₂-MEŠ GAL₂-MEŠ

(41) (If) a planet stands in front of the Moon: in that year there will be deaths.

4242

* mulUDU.IDIM ina IGI dUTU GUBiz ina MU BI GANBA TUR

(42) (If) a planet stands in front of the Sun: in that year business will reduce.

4343

* mulUDU.IDIM u muldele-bat it-ten₂-tu-u₂ UŠ₂-MEŠ ina KUR GAL₂-MEŠ

(43) (If) a planet and Venus keep moving parallel (to each other): there will be deaths in the land.

4444

* mulUDU.IDIM u muldele-bat KUR-ma it-ten₂-tu-u₂ NAM.UŠ₂ dan-nu ina KUR GAL₂ši

(44) (If) a planet and Venus reach (each other) and keep moving parallel (to each other): there will be severe plague in the land.

4545

* mulUDU.IDIM muldele-bat KUR-ma DIB-ši gišTUKUL dER₃.RA dan-nu ina KUR GAL₂ši

(45) (If) a planet reaches Venus and crosses it: there will be Erra's strong weapon in the land.

4646

* mulUDU.IDIM mulUDU.IDIM KURdam-ma DIB-ši gišTUKUL dER₃.RA dan-nu ina KUR GAL₂ši

(46) (If) a planet reaches (another) planet and crosses it: there will be Erra's strong weapon in the land.

4747

* mulUDU.IDIM mulU₄.AL.TAR KURdam-ma it-ten₂-tu-u₂ dER₃.RA KUR GU₇ UŠ₂-MEŠ ina KUR GAL₂-MEŠ KUR 1niš TUR-MEŠ

(47) (If) a planet reaches Dapinu and they keep moving parallel (to each other): Erra will devour the land; there will be deaths in the land; the land will shrink completely.

4848

* mulUDU.IDIM mulU₄.AL.TAR KURdam-ma i-ti-iq GANBA!(KI.MIN) ina KUR LA₂ : GAL₂

(48) (If) a planet reaches Dapinu and crosses (it): business will decrease; (or) exist.

4949

* mulUDU.IDIM mulU₄.AL.TAR KURdam-ma TE-MEŠ NERGALₓ(U.GUR) GU₇

(49) (If) a planet reaches Dapinu and they approach (each other): Nergal will devour.

5050

* mulUDU.IDIM ana mulSAG.ME.GAR TE GANBA LA₂ṭi A.RI.A ana KISLAḪ₃ NIGIN-MEŠ dER₃.RA KUR GU₇ bi-bil A-MEŠ KUR ub-bal

(50) (If) a planet approaches Jupiter: business will decrease; flocks will gather in a fortress; Erra will devour the land; high water will sweep away the land. King will send hostilities to king; there will be a severe collapse; there will be severe heat in the summer; there will be severe cold in the winter.

5151

LUGAL ana LUGAL ze-ra-a-tu₄ KINar₂ mi-iq-tu₄ dan-nu GAL₂ ina AMA-ME um-šu₁₄ dan-nu GAL₂ ina EN.TE.NA EN.TE.NA dan-nu GAL₂

5252

* mulUDU.IDIM ana dŠUL.PA.E₃.A TE ŠUBti₃ si-si-i SIG₅? bu-li₃ ZAḪ₂

(52) (If) a planet approaches Šulpae: epidemic of horses; the best of the livestock will be destroyed.

5353

* mulUDU.IDIM ana mulSAG.ME.GAR TE mi-iq-tu₄ dan-nu ina KUR GAL₂

(53) (If) a planet approaches Jupiter: there will be a severe downfall in the land.

5454

* mulUDU.IDIM ana mulUDU.IDIM TE AB.SIN₂ IGI-šu₂ ip-te-te kiš-šu₂-tu₂ GAL₂ ṭar-du AŠ.TE DABbat NIDBA DINGIR-MEŠ i-šak-kan E₂.KUR-MEŠ 1niš i-za-na-an

(54) (If) a planet approaches (another) planet (and) the furrow has opened its surface: there will be a take-over; a fugitive will seize the throne; he will place food-offerings for the gods; he will provision the temples equally.

5555

* mulUDU.IDIM ana mulUDU.IDIM TE DUMU LUGAL ša ina IRI ZA₃-ia₅ aš₂-bu ana AD-šu₂ ḪI.GAR DU₃uš-ma AŠ.TE la₃ DABbat DUMU ma-am-ma-an-ma

(55) (If) a planet approaches (another) planet: the son of a king who lives in a town on my border will make rebellion against his father but will not seize the throne; the son of a nobody will emerge and seize the throne; he will return the gods' temples to their (former) condition; he will establish regular offerings for the great gods; he will provision the temples equally.

5656

E₃-ma AŠ.TE DABbat E₂-MEŠ DINGIR-MEŠ ana KI-ši-na GURar₂ sat-tuk-ku DINGIR-MEŠ GAL-MEŠ u₂-kan E₂.KUR-MEŠ 1niš i-za-na-an

5757

* mulUDU.IDIM ana mulLUGAL TE ŠU.BI.AŠ.AM₃<(...)>

(57) (If) a planet approaches the King: ditto.

5858

* mulUDU.IDIM ana mulLUGAL TE taš-nun-tu₄ GAL₂ši DUMU LUGAL ša₂ ina IRI ZA₃-ia₅ aš₂-bu [...]

(58) (If) a planet approaches the King: there will be battle. The son of a king who lives in a town on my border [...].

5959

* mulUDU.IDIM ana mulKAK.SI.SA₂ TE AB.SIN₂ GUN₂-sa₃ LA₂ṭi gišGIŠIMMAR MA.DAM-ša₂ LA₂ṭa MU.UN.IR₁₀ ŠE u ŠE.GIŠ.I₃ LA₂ṭi-ma

(59) (If) a planet approaches the Arrow: the yield of the furrow will diminish; the date palm will reduce its abundance; the supply of barley and sesame will diminish and very hostile talk will fall on the land; Adad will bitterly raise his voice on a cloudless day; the people of the land will diminish.

6060

tuš-šu₂ dan-nu UGU KUR ŠUBut dIŠKUR ina U₄ la DUNGU GU₃-šu₂ GIGiš ŠUBdi-ma UN-MEŠ KUR TUR

6161

* mulUDU.IDIM SA₅ ana A₂-šu₂ MUL GE₆ iṭ-ṭe₄-ḫe dIŠKUR RAiṣ

(61) (If) a dark star comes alongside a red planet: Adad will devastate.

6262

* mulUDU.IDIM SA₅ ina MURU₂-šu₂ MUL GE₆ GUB AN.GE₆ GARan

(62) (If) a dark star stands in the middle of a red planet: an eclipse will take place.

6363

* mulUDU.IDIM SA₅ ina EGIR-šu₂ MUL GE₆ GUB AN.GE₆ GARan

(63) (If) a dark star stands behind a red planet: an eclipse will take place.

6464

* mulUDU.IDIM SA₅ ana A₂-šu₂ MUL GE₆ GUBiz dIŠKUR RAiṣ

(64) (If) a dark star stands alongside a red planet: Adad will devastate.

6565

* mulUDU.IDIM SA₅ u MUL SIG₇ it-ten₂-tu-u₂ RI.RI.GA bu-li₃

(65) (If) a red planet and a yellow star keep moving parallel (to each other): epidemic of livestock.

6666

* mulUDU.IDIM SA₅ u MUL SIG₇ it-ten₂-tu-u₂ ŠU.BI.AŠ.AM₃<(RI.RI.GA)> bu-li₃1

(66) (If) a red planet and a yellow star keep moving parallel (to each other): ditto (epidemic of livestock).

6767

* mulUDU.IDIM SA₅ u MUL SIG₇ TE-MEŠ ŠU.BI.AŠ.AM₃<(RI.RI.GA)> bu-li₃

(67) (If) a red planet and a yellow star approach (each other), ditto (epidemic of livestock).

6868

* mulUDU.IDIM SA₅ IGI NAM.UŠ₂-MEŠ GAL₂-MEŠ

(68) (If) a red planet appears: there will be plagues.

6969

* mulUDU.IDIM SA₅ nu-ḫuš UN-MEŠ

(69) (If) a planet is red: abundance for the people.

7070

* mulUDU.IDIM SA₅ ana MUL₄ SA₅ TE AN.GE₆ la₃ TAG₄

(70) (If) a red planet approaches a red star: the eclipse will not spare (anything).

7171

* mulUDU.IDIM SA₅ ina GIŠ.NIM u GIŠ.ŠU₂ [...]

(71) (If) a planet is red at sunrise and at sunset: [...].

7272

* mulUDU.IDIM ina KASKAL šu-ut dEN.LIL₂.LA₂ GUB KUR₂ kurURIki SIG₃aṣ LUGAL kurURIki KIN-šu₂ la₃ i-kaš-šad

(72) (If) a planet stands in the Path of Those of Enlil: an enemy will beat Akkad; the king of Akkad will not achieve his intention.

7373

* mulUDU.IDIM GU₄.U₄ dṣal-bat-a-nu MU-šu₂ ša₂-ru-ru iš-ši LUGAL ELAM.MAki i-dan-nin

(73) (If) planet whose name is Mercury (or) Mars is imbued with brilliance: the king of Elam will become strong.

7474

* mulUDU.IDIM u mulTI₈mušen it-ten₂-tu-u₂ ŠE.GIŠ.I₃ SI.SA₂

(74) (If) a planet and the Eagle keep moving parallel (to each other): sesame will thrive.

7575

* mulUDU.IDIM u mulTI₈mušen it-ten-mi-du ŠE.GIŠ.I₃ ina KUR GIŠ

(75) (If) a planet and the Eagle touch each other: sesame will thrive in the land.

7676

* mulUDU.IDIM u mulTI₈mušen iṭ-ḫu-u₂ ŠE.GIŠ.I₃ SI.SA₂

(76) (If) a planet and the Eagle approach (each other): sesame will thrive.

7777

* mulUDU.IDIM u mula-ru₆ : mula-ḫu-u₂ it-ten₂-tu-u₂ ŠE.GIŠ.I₃ SIG₅

(77) (If) a planet and the Frond (or): the Alien star keep moving parallel (to each other): sesame will be good.

7878

* mulUDU.IDIM u mula-ru₆ : mula-ḫu-u₂ it-ten₂-tu-u₂ ŠE.GIŠ.I₃ SIG₅2

(78) (If) a planet and the Frond (or): the Alien star keep moving parallel (to each other): sesame will be good.

7979

* mulUDU.IDIM mul₂ELLAG₂ TE-šu ŠE.GIŠ.I₃ SI.SA₂

(79) (If) the Kidney approaches a planet: sesame will thrive.

8080

* mulUDU.IDIM mulMAN-ma TE-šu SIG₅ MAŠ₂.ANŠE ZAḪ₂

(80) (If) the Strange star approaches a planet: the best of the livestock will be destroyed.

8181

* mulUDU.IDIM ŠUR-ma mulMAR.GID₂.DA NIGIN GAL-MEŠ u TUR-MEŠ UŠ₂-MEŠ

(81) (If) a planet flashes and surrounds the Wagon: the great and the small will die.

8282

* mulUDU.IDIM ŠUR-ma ana IGI mulSAG.ME.GAR GUBiz ŠU.BI.AŠ.AM₃<(GAL-MEŠ)> u TUR-MEŠ UŠ₂-MEŠ

(82) (If) a planet flashes and stands in front of Jupiter: ditto (the great and the small will die).

8383

* mulUDU.IDIM ŠUR-ma mul₂SAG.ME.GAR NIGIN ŠU.BI.AŠ.AM₃<(GAL-MEŠ)> u TUR-MEŠ UŠ₂-MEŠ

(83) (If) a planet flashes and surrounds Jupiter: ditto (the great and the small will die).

8484

* mulUDU.IDIM ŠUR-ma ana IGIet mulSAG.ME.GAR GUB GAL-MEŠ [...]

(84) (If) a planet flashes and stands opposite Jupiter: the great [...].

8585

* mulUDU.IDIM ŠUR-ma ana ŠA₃ d30 KU₄ KUR-E.NE LA₂ [...]

(85) (If) a planet flashes and enters the Moon: the lands will diminish [...].

8686

* mulUDU.IDIM ŠUR-ma ana d30 TE TUR-MEŠ [...]

(86) (If) a planet flashes and approaches the Moon: the small [...].

8787

* mulUDU.IDIM ŠUR-ma ana MUL GAL TE GAL-MEŠ UŠ₂-MEŠ

(87) (If) a planet flashes and approaches a large star: the great will die.

8888

* mulUDU.IDIM ŠUR-ma ana IGI dAL.TAR [...]

(88) (If) a planet flashes and [...] the front of Jupiter: [...].

8989

* mulUDU.IDIM ŠUR-ma ana IGI mulAL.TAR DAB GAL-MEŠ [...]

(89) (If) a planet flashes and grasps the front of Jupiter: the great [...].

9090

* mulUDU.IDIM MUL.MUL KURud d7.BI KUR GU₇-MEŠ

(90) (If) a planet reaches the Bristle: the Seven will devour the land.

9191

* mulUDU.IDIM u MUL.MUL TE-MEŠ INIM SES-MEŠ [...]

(91) (If) a planet and the Bristle approach (each other): bitter words [...].

9292

* mulUDU.IDIM ana mulSIPA.ZI.AN.NA i-mid UŠ₂-MEŠ ina KUR GAR-MEŠ

(92) (If) a planet touches Orion: deaths will occur in the land.

9393

* mulUDU.IDIM ana mulSIPA.ZI.AN.NA TE [...]

(93) (If) a planet approaches Orion: [...].

9494

* mulUDU.IDIM MUL.MUL-MEŠ ANe u₂-lap-pat LUGAL KUR.KUR u₂-qat-ta₅ UŠ [...]

(94) (If) a planet upsets the stars of heaven: the king will destroy the lands ... [...].

9595

* mulUDU.IDIM a-dir ANŠE.KUR.RA UŠ₂-MEŠ ana mu-šu-ud ŠA₃ IZI.GAR

(95) (If) a planet is dark: horses will die; anger to make the heart thump.

9696

* mulUDU.IDIM a-dir EN ANe [...]

(96) (If) a planet is dark: the lord of heaven [...].

9797

* mulUDU.IDIM a-dir A.GA ZI-ma BURU₁₄ SIG₅ E₃it IRI KUR₂ TUM₃-šu

(97) (If) a planet is dark: a flood will rise and the harvest will be good; departure from a hostile city will carry him off.

9898

* mulUDU.IDIM miš₂-ḫa im-šuḫ SIG₅ MAŠ₂.ANŠE kurMAR.TUki ZAḪ₂

(98) (If) a planet flashes: the best of the livestock of Amurru will be destroyed.

9999

* mulUDU.IDIM miš₂-ḫa ⸢im⸣-[šuḫ ...]

(99) (If) a planet flashes: [...].

100100

* mulUDU.IDIM d⸢ḪANIŠ⸣ GAM u ad₂-riš KU₄ DINGIR KUR-ma TUŠ la₃ ZAḪ₂ x [...]

(100) (If) a planet breaches Haniš or enters (it) dimly, the god will reach but the dwelling will not be destroyed.

101101

* ina ANe miš₂-ḫu ša₂ mulUDU.IDIM IGI ŠUBtu₄ : mi-iq-tu₄ : me-šit-tu₂ ina KUR GAL₂

(101) (If) in heaven the flash of a planet appears: there will be an epidemic (or): collapse (or): stroke in the land.

102102

* ina ANe miš₂-ḫu ša₂ mulUDU.IDIM ana GIR₃.RA.RA kure-dam-ma-ra-iz GIR₃.BAL [...]

(102) (If) in heaven the flash of a planet (occurs): for the devastation of Idamaraz [....] devastation.

103103

* ṣal-lum-mu-u₂ ša₂ mulUDU.IDIM IGI DU₃.A.BI MU BI KUR₂ ZI-ma i-da-aš TURar₂ KUR₂ BI mi-iq-ti-šu₂ ZAḪ₂

(103) (If) the comet of a planet appears: all that year an enemy will arise but will deplete his strength; that enemy will be destroyed in his (own) collapse.

104104

* ana ŠA₃ ⸢mul⸣1(IKU)gana₂ mulUDU.IDIM KU₄-ma IGI ina KUR ŠE.GIŠ.I₃ SI.SA₂ GANBA ina-pu-uš

(104) (If) a planet enters the Field and is visible (there): sesame will thrive in the land; trade will be carried out.

105105

* mulUDU.IDIM ana IGI mulid₂IDIGNA GUB dIŠKUR RAiṣ : ŠEG₃-MEŠ : ILLU-MEŠ GAL₂-MEŠ

(105) (If) a planet stands in front of the Tigris star: Adad will devastate (or): there will be rains (or): floods.

106106

* mulUDU.IDIM ana EGIR mulid₂IDIGNA GUBiz KI.MIN<(dIŠKUR)> RAiṣ : ŠEG₃-MEŠ : ILLU-MEŠ GAL₂-MEŠ

(106) (If) a planet stands at the rear of the Tigris star: ditto (Adad will devastate (or): there will be rains (or): floods).

107107

* mulUDU.IDIM ana ŠA₃ mulid₂IDIGNA TE ŠEG₃-MEŠ u ILLU-MEŠ ZAL-MEŠ

(107) (If) a planet approaches the interior of the Tigris star: rains and floods will keep persisting.

108108

* mulUDU.IDIM u dṣal-bat-a-nu im-taḫ-ḫa-ru-ma GUB-MEŠ ZIut ELAM.MAki

(108) (If) a planet and Mars keep opposing (each other) and stand (there): attack of Elam.

109109

* mulUDU.IDIM u MUL SIG₇ im-taḫ-ḫa-ru-ma GUB-MEŠ GAL-MEŠ UŠ₂-MEŠ

(109) (If) a planet and a yellow star keep opposing (each other) and stand (there): the great will die.

110110

* mulUDU.IDIM lu 2 lu 3 lu-u₂ 4 ina dUTU.E₃.A EGIR a-ḫa-miš E₃im ina MU BI ŠEG₃-MEŠ u ILLU-MEŠ ZAL.ZAL-MEŠ

(110) (If) a planet, either 2 or 3 or 4, rise one after another at sunrise: in that year rains and floods will keep persisting.

111111

* mulUDU.IDIM ina ŠA₃ mulGIR₂.TAB GUB ina MU BI ŠEG₃-MEŠ u ILLU-MEŠ ZAL.ZAL-MEŠ

(111) (If) a planet stands inside the Scorpion: in that year rain and floods will keep persisting.

112112

* mulUDU.IDIM ana IGI mulGIR₂.TAB GUB ina MU BI ŠEG₃-MEŠ u ILLU-MEŠ ZAL.ZAL-MEŠ

(112) (If) a planet stands in front of the Scorpion: in that year rain and floods willkeep persisting.

113113

* mulUDU.IDIM ana mulGIR₂.TAB TE ina MU BI ŠEG₃-MEŠ u ILLU-MEŠ ZAL.ZAL-MEŠ

(113) (If) a planet approaches the Scorpion: in that year rain and floods will keep persisting.

114114

* mulUDU.IDIM ana mulUZ₃ TE a-ḫu-u₂ ZI-ma AŠ.⸢TE⸣ [...]

(114) (If) a planet approaches the Goat: a stranger will arise and [...] the throne.

115115

* mulUDU.IDIM mulUZ₃ u MUL SIG₇ it-ten₂-tu-u₂ ŠUBti₃ SIG₅ MAŠ₂.ANŠE

(115) (If) a planet, the Goat, and a yellow star keep moving parallel (to each other): epidemic of the best of the livestock.

116116

* mulUDU.IDIM ŠUR-ma ana IGI muldele-bat GUBiz ina KEŠDAtu₂ KUR₂ IRI NIGIN-ma KURad₂

(116) (If) a planet flashes and stands in front of Venus: the enemy will surround the city by a conspiracy and conquer (it).

117117

* mulUDU.IDIM u muldele-bat in-ne₂-tu-ma ina KI.TA-šu₂-nu d30 IGI ina ITI BI AN.GE₆ LUGAL ELAM.MAki GAR-ma TUR₃ KUR ZAḪ₂

(117) (If) a planet and Venus move parallel (to each other) and the Moon appears underneath them: in that month an eclipse of the king of Elam will take place and the animal stall of the land will be destroyed.

118118

* mulUDU.IDIM ina ŠA₃ MUL.MUL GUBiz ŠUBti₃ SIG₅ MAŠ₂.ANŠE

(118) (If) a planet stands inside the Bristle: epidemic of the best of the livestock.

119119

* mulUDU.IDIM ina MURU₂ MUL.MUL GUBiz AN.GE₆

(119) (If) a planet stands in the centre of the Bristle: eclipse.

120120

* mulUDU.IDIM KI MUL.MUL in-ne₂-tu id-ra-nu GAL₂ši

(120) (If) a planet moves parallel with the Bristle: there will be salinity (in the fields).

121121

* mulUDU.IDIM u MUL.MUL TE-MEŠ NIMUR-MEŠ ina KUR GAL₂

(121) (If) a planet and the Bristle approach (each other): there will be salinity in the fields.

122122

* mulUDU.IDIM MUL.MUL KURud d7.BI KUR GU₇-MEŠ

(122) (If) a planet reaches the Bristle: the Seven will devour the land.

123123

* mulUDU.IDIM ana mulis le-e TE LUGAL kurELAM.MAki UŠ₂

(123) (If) a planet approaches the Bull's Jaw: the king of Elam will die.

124124

* mulUDU.IDIM [...]

(124) (If) a planet [...].

125125

* mulUDU.IDIM [...] kurMAR.TUki [...]

(125) (If) a planet [...] Amurru [...].

126126

* mulUDU.IDIM la x [...] x AN.GE₆

(126) (If) a planet does not ... [...] ... eclipse.

127127

* mulUDU.IDIM [...] AN.GE₆

(127) (If) a planet [...] eclipse.

128128

* mulUDU.IDIM LA₂ GAR LUGAL KUR GAL ARAD-MEŠ-šu₂ E₂.GAL i-maš-ša₂-ʾu-u₂ u šu₂-nu EGIR EN-šu₂-nu UŠ₂-<<MEŠ>> ZAḪ₂-MEŠ

(128) (If) a planet forms a cross: the king of a great land - his slaves will pillage the palace but they themselves will die (and) be destroyed after (the death of) their lord.

129129

* mulUDU.IDIM iš-pa-lu-ur-ta GAR LUGAL ARAD-MEŠ-šu₂ GAZ-MEŠ-šu₂ E₂.GAL-šu₂ i-maš-ša₂-ʾu-u₂ EGIR MU la₃ SI.SA₂

(129) (If) a planet forms a cross: a king - his slaves will kill him; they will pillage his palace; the rest of the year will not go well.

130130

* mulUDU.IDIM ina tu₁₅U₁₈.LU GUB ZIut ELAM.MAki u gu-ti-i

(130) (If) a planet stands in the south: attack of Elam and Guti.

131131

* mulUDU.IDIM ina tu₁₅SI.SA₂ GUB UŠ₂-MEŠ ina KUR GAL₂-MEŠ ZIut kurURIki ana KUR KUR₂

(131) (If) a planet stands in the north: there will be deaths in the land; attack of Akkad against the land of an enemy.

132132

* mulUDU.IDIM ina tu₁₅KUR.RA GUB ZIut SU.BIR₄ki u ka₃-ši-i

(132) (If) a planet stands in the east: attack of Subartu and the Kassites.

133133

* mulUDU.IDIM ina tu₁₅MAR.TU GUB ZIut MAR.TUki u SU.BIR₄ki

(133) (If) a planet stands in the west: attack of Amurru and Subartu.

134134

* mulUDU.IDIM ana IGI d30 GUB UR.MAḪ-MEŠ IDIM-MEŠ-ma A.RA₂ KU₅as

(134) (If) a planet stands in front of the Moon: lions will go wild and the way will be blocked.

135135

* mulUDU.IDIM ana UGU d30 GUN₃-ma GUB UR.MAḪ-MEŠ IDIM-MEŠ-ma A.RA₂ KU₅as

(135) (If) a planet becomes multicoloured above the Moon and stands (there): lions will go wild and the way will be blocked.

136136

* mulUDU.IDIM ana UGU d30 GUN₃-ma GUB ana ŠA₃ d30 KU₄ UR.MAḪ-MEŠ IDIM-MEŠ-ma SIG₅ MAŠ₂.ANŠE GAZ-MEŠ

(136) (If) a planet becomes multicoloured above the Moon and stands (there), (and) enters the Moon: lions will go wild and will kill the best of the livestock.

137137

* mulUDU.IDIM.SAG.UŠ KI.MIN mulzi-ba-ni-tu₄ MUL dUTU ina dUTU.E₃.A IGI.LA₂-ma MU 1-KAM ina ANe

(137) Saturn, alternatively, the Scales, star of the Sun, appears at sunrise and stands in heaven for 1 year and disappears at sunset; that star either displays redness: it disappears at sunset and for 20 days it is delayed from heaven and it rises (and) appears in the path of the Sun at sunrise.

138138

GUB-ma ina dUTU.ŠU₂.A TUM₃ MUL BI šum₄-ma SA₅ GAR : ana dUTU.ŠU₂.A TUM₃-ma 20 u₄-mu ina ANe

139139

uḫ-ḫa-ram-ma ina dUTU.E₃.A ina KASKAL dUTU KURḫa IGImar

140140

* mulUDU.IDIMbi-ib-bu ša₂ dNIN.URTA MU-NE ina dUTU.E₃.A lu ina dUTU.ŠU₂.A IGI.LA₂-ma 7 u₄-mu KI.MIN

(140) A planet (gloss: planet) whose name is Ninurta appears at sunrise or at sunset and stands in heave for 7 days, secondly 14 days, thirdly 21 days, fourthly a month, fifthly 15 days and, when it disappears, it is delayed for as many days as it stood in heaven, and rises and appears either at sunrise or at sunset in the path of the Sun. (If) that star appears in winter: rain and flood. (If) it appears in summer, you observe its appearance, its soakings", where it appears, and the wind that blows. That star is either red and bright or yellow and dark ... [...] Either rain will rain, or a flood will come, or onset of a storm, or Adad will raise his voice, or lightning will flash, or an enemy attack, or an eclipse, or a red glow will appear in heaven.

141141

14 u₄-mu KI.3 21 u₄-mu KI.4 ITI KI.5 U₄ 15-KAM ina ANe GUB-ma GIM TUM₃ ma-la u₄-mu ša₂ ina ANe GUBzu

142142

uḫ-ḫa-ram-ma lu ina dUTU.E₃.A lu ina dUTU.ŠU₂.A ina KASKAL dUTU KURḫa IGImar MUL BI ina EN.TE.NA IGI-ma ŠEG₃ u ILLU

143143

ina E₂-MEŠ IGI-ma zi-[me]-⸢šu₂⸣ ri-is-ni-šu₂ KI IGI.LA₂ u TU₁₅ ša₂ DUku URU₃ar₂ MUL BI šum₄-ma SA₅ ba-il₃

144144

šum-ma SIG₇ u GE₆ na-ra-[...] šum-ma ŠEG₃ SUR šum-ma ILLU DUkam šum-ma ZI me-ḫe-e šum-ma dIŠKUR

145145

GU₃-šu₂ ŠUBdi šum-ma NIM.GIR₂ ŠU.ŠU šum-ma ZI KUR₂ šum-ma AN.GE₆ šum-ma ina ANe ʾa₄-ku₆-ku₆-tu₄ IGI-MEŠ

146146

* mulbi-ib-bu ana mulis le-e TE ina MU BI LUGAL ELAM.MAki UŠ₂

(146) (If) a planet approaches the Bull's Jaw: in that year the king of Elam will die.

147147

* mulbi-ib-bu ana mulUZ₃ [...] kurURIki BIR-ma LUGAL URIki UŠ₂

(147) (If) a planet [...] the Goat: Akkad will be scattered and the king of Akkad will die.

148148

* mulṣal-bat-a-nu ana mulŠU.GI TE ina kurMAR.TUki MUNUS.KUR₂tu₄ GAL₂-ma ŠEŠ ŠEŠ-šu₂ GU₇ E₂.GAL NUN iš-šal-lal

(148) (If) Mars approaches the Old Man: in Amurru there will be enmity and brother will devour brother; the prince's palace will be plundered; the treasure of the land will leave for another country and the divine emblems of the land will be destroyed; his gods will forsake him (and) turn him aside; rains and floods will be cut off.

149149

MUNUS.URI₃ KUR ana KUR MANtim-ma E₃-ma ŠU.NIR KUR ŠUL-MEŠ DINGIR-MEŠ-šu₂ TAG₄-MEŠ-šu₂ u₂-saḫ-ḫa-ru-šu₂ ŠEG₃-ME u ILLU-ME KU₅-MEŠ

150150

* dṣal-bat-a-nu a-dir UN-MEŠ ša₂ SU.GU₇ IGI-MEŠ NINDA nap-ša₂ GU₇-MEŠ ŠA₃ KUR DU₁₀.GA BURU₁₄ KUR SI.SA₂

(150) (If) Mars is dark: people who have seen hunger will eat plentiful food; the heart of the land will become good; the harvest of the land will thrive; the best of Sumuqan's livestock will thrive; the offspring of cattle will increase; cattle in the open country will lie down in green pasture; the winter growth will last until summer (and) the summer growth until winter; people who have seen hunger will see rest.

151151

SIG₅ MAŠ₂.ANŠE dŠAKKAN₂ SI.SA₂ U₃.TU AB₂.GU₄-ḪI.A DAGAL AB₂.GU₄-ḪI.A ina EDIN a-bur-riš

152152

NU₂-MEŠ di-iš EN.TE.NA ana BURU₁₄ di-iš BURU₁₄ ana EN.TE.NA uš-ta-bar-ra UN-MEŠ ša₂ SU.GU₇ IGI-MEŠ pa-ša₂-ḫa IGI.MEŠ

153153

* ma-ak-ru-u₂ ana ŠA₃ d30 KU₄ la₃ IGI DUMU LUGAL AŠ.TE DABbat

(153) (If) the Red (star) enters the Moon (but) does not appear (there): a king's son will seize the throne.

1Lines 65-66 are identical; Largement suggests that the second sig₇ should be read GAL! but there could equally be dittography of the verb.

2Lines 77-78 are identical.
